sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38121" key="e)panapodi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανα-ποδίζω</orth>, <sense id="n38121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retrace one's steps</tr_> in argument, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:813:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">813.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
